mapper.insert: INSERT INTO whitelist (type, value, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user_id, is_del) VALUES (#{type}, #{value}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createUserId}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE whitelist
type = #{type}, value = #{value}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE whitelist SET is_del = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, type, value, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user_id, is_del FROM whitelist WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0

SELECT id, config_key as configKey, config_value as configValue, config_type as configType, description, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, update_user_id as updateUserId, update_user as updateUser FROM whitelist_config ORDER BY id

SELECT id, config_key as configKey, config_value as configValue, config_type as configType, description, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, update_user_id as updateUserId, update_user as updateUser FROM whitelist_config WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO whitelist_config (config_key, config_value, config_type, description, create_time, update_time, update_user_id, update_user) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{configType}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW(), #{updateUserId}, #{updateUser}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = #{configValue}, config_type = #{configType}, description = #{description}, update_time = NOW(), update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, update_user = #{updateUser}
mapper.select: SELECT config_key as configKey, config_value as configValue, update_time as updateTime, update_user as updateUser FROM whitelist_config ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO whitelist_access_log (whitelist_id, access_ip, access_url, request_method, access_result, fail_reason, user_id, user_agent, request_params, response_code, response_time, access_time) VALUES (#{whitelistId}, #{accessIp}, #{accessUrl}, #{requestMethod}, #{accessResult}, #{failReason}, #{userId}, #{userAgent}, #{requestParams}, #{responseCode}, #{responseTime}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, whitelist_id as whitelistId, access_ip as accessIp, access_url as accessUrl, request_method as requestMethod, access_result as accessResult, fail_reason as failReason, user_id as userId, user_agent as userAgent, request_params as requestParams, response_code as responseCode, response_time as responseTime, access_time as accessTime FROM whitelist_access_log WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN access_result = 'SUCCESS' AND DATE(access_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as todaySuccess, SUM(CASE WHEN access_result = 'DENIED' AND DATE(access_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as todayFailed, COUNT(*) as totalAccess, SUM(CASE WHEN access_result = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as abnormalAccess FROM whitelist_access_log

SELECT DATE(access_time) as date, COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN access_result = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN access_result = 'DENIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as deniedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN access_result = 'ERROR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as errorCount FROM whitelist_access_log WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(access_time) ORDER BY date DESC

SELECT access_ip as ip, COUNT(*) as accessCount, SUM(CASE WHEN access_result = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN access_result = 'DENIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as deniedCount, MAX(access_time) as lastAccessTime FROM whitelist_access_log GROUP BY access_ip ORDER BY accessCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT access_url as url, COUNT(*) as accessCount, SUM(CASE WHEN access_result = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN access_result = 'DENIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as deniedCount, AVG(response_time) as avgResponseTime FROM whitelist_access_log GROUP BY access_url ORDER BY accessCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
